# Known extension-less / dotfile basenames — one basename per line. Committed allowlist.
#
# Extension-less files are the highest-risk vector for stray binaries (e.g. a Linux
# `ffmpeg` executable). The "PR Repo Hygiene" workflow BLOCKS any PR that ADDS an
# extension-less file whose exact basename is not listed here. Matching is by basename
# only, so one entry (e.g. `ffmpeg`) covers every directory. To add one on purpose, list
# its basename here in the same PR (or a maintainer overrides with `allow-new-extension`).
#
# Glob patterns are allowed here too (`*` any run, `?` any single character).
# Lines starting with # and blank lines are ignored. Keep sorted.
.all-contributorsrc
.editorconfig
.gitattributes
.gitignore
.gitkeep
.nupkg.metadata
.signature.p7s
.vsconfig
CODEOWNERS
LICENSE
cstddef
ffmpeg
index
new
